LCC-HS12-L4-10001300-HSSCIENG1112-TRT-AAD-01 • HS Science: Engineering Design (Grades 11–12) • Engineering Design: System Effects of Proposed Solutions

The Soundprint Archive

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is Mr. Adesanya teaching Maya about?
2QUESTION 2: According to Mr. Adesanya, what tradeoff did Dr. James West accept in 1962?
3QUESTION 3: What does Maya's prediction reveal about how the new microphone design will affect the community archive?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Justify three claims using evidence from the dialogue. First, name what the teacher's lesson is really about and the line that proves it. Second, name the tradeoff Dr. West accepted and the line where the teacher states it. Third, name what Maya predicts the archive will hold and the line where she says it.
